product_results.title: TAURI for iPhone 16 Pro Case 6.3" with 1-Pack Screen Protector, Compatible with MagSafe, [Not-Yellowing] 16 FT Drop Protection, Military-Grade Shockproof Transparent Magnetic Phone Cover - Clear

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be a quality product that is easy to install. The phone fits perfectly in the case, and users appreciate the included extra screen protectors. The case provides good protection and has an appealing appearance. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the case's durability and potential discoloration over time.

authors_reviews.title: Amazing case .
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been using this case for a couple weeks this case is very solid and it gives you a really good feeling that your phone will be safe in there and also come with the screen protector amazing
authors_reviews.author: Gurdeep Virdi

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: The case was exactly as I expected. Fit perfectly without being heavy . The screen saver went on easily and no issues using the touch screen functions.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Good quality
authors_reviews.text: I recommend having a screen protector to go along with this case. I’ve had it for some months now and I have dropped my phone a few times; no scratches or damage to the camera. This will protect it from simple slips and falls. Not super heavy duty but it doesn’t feel cheap and useless and so far it’s worked for protecting my phone
authors_reviews.author: kyra gutang

authors_reviews.title: Great case, greater price.
authors_reviews.text: Just got my brand new iPhone 17 pro, and managed to snag this phone case during prime day at <$12. VERY happy as of now. The phone fits perfectly and effortlessly into the case and feels phenomenal. The screen protector is an awesome plus too.
authors_reviews.author: Marlon

authors_reviews.title: Great case! Great customer support!
authors_reviews.text: Been purchasing iPhone cases and screen protectors from Tauri for past couple phones. Happy with the quality and looks of the cases. This purchase had a minor issue with glass protector missing. Their support was prompt and great to deal with to resolve the manner to my satisfaction!
authors_reviews.author: Peter Johnston

authors_reviews.title: Great deal
authors_reviews.text: Great case and screen protector for the price. Very sturdy, no imperfections, MagSafe. Feels like a much more expensive case to be honest. Screen protector was a great add on as I needed to replace mine - went on perfectly with no bubbles. However, it doesn't come with the frame that helps you put the protector on - do note if you struggle with that.
authors_reviews.author: R.C.

authors_reviews.title: Good and bad
authors_reviews.text: I was initially going to return this case - the color (like the iPhone “Deep Purple”) is dark enough to look black in some light, and I’m unhappy about that. Want a case that’s a brighter shade. Unfortunately I ended up having to keep the case because I can’t wait for a different one I already ordered that won’t arrive until after we’ve left for a trip, and I won’t take my brand new phone on a trip without protection. Anyway, so this case came with two screen protectors, two camera lens protectors and an alignment tool - all which I wasn’t expecting, but appreciated. The case itself is a real disappointment, though - and not just the color. The clear panel on the back is just flimsy plastic film - no protection value whatsoever. And the “mag safe” advertising is misleading. This case does not have an integrated magnet. Instead the magnet comes separately and has to be stuck to your phone! If you don’t want to stick it directly to your phone they provide a circle of stick-on film that you stick between the magnet and your phone, and it’s SO ugly and shows even after the magnet is affixed and the cover is on. Probably the worst part, though, is that this piece of plastic with markings on it that they provide for aligning the magnet properly is IMPOSSIBLE to use unless you have four hands because of the elevated bumper of the camera lens - this stiff plastic sheet slides right off the back of the phone every time. As a result, I ended up aligning the magnet wrong, took it off and tossed it. This design they call “mag safe” is a complete FAIL. So, basically, I spent $20 on two camera lens covers and two screen protectors (which I didn’t need because I had purchased one, and already used it, separately. Although this case was packaged with care, you can’t tell what you’re getting until you remove the cellophane wrapping, and then it was just a huge waste of money. Wouldn’t recommend - sorry.
authors_reviews.author: RandM

authors_reviews.title: Good case ✨
authors_reviews.text: I love the feel of the case & overall the look of it. It's not too bulky & it hugs the phone, has a nice grip to it doesn't feel slippery at all. also comes with a screen protector.
authors_reviews.author: Heather
